description_long: This object is a rectangular, deep, open container with slightly rounded corners and a matte black finish. The walls are thick and rise vertically from a broad, flat base, giving it a robust and solid appearance. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, suitable for holding or containing items. The exterior surface is smooth and unadorned, with no visible engravings, handles, or decorative features. The object appears to be made of a dense, stone-like material, possibly granite or concrete, commonly used for graveyard receptacles or urns. Its minimalist design suggests a utilitarian function, likely as a grave marker base, flower holder, or ash receptacle in a cemetery setting.
description: A matte black, rectangular, deep open container with thick walls and rounded corners, likely made of stone or concrete. Its smooth, unadorned surface and robust build suggest use as a graveyard receptacle or urn base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open, rectangular cavity with thick, straight walls and rounded corners.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the container and the consistent thickness of the walls.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the open cavity and smooth, unmarked surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the depth and solid construction.
